plan_295_03.description: Frontend high-impact components tested (only tokenEncryption runnable)
plan_295_03.import_path_issues: Files in src/lib/ not accessible via @lib/ alias in jest config

overall_assessment.blocker_reason: Structural issue: jest config maps @lib/ to lib/ but source files split between lib/ and src/lib/
overall_assessment.potential_coverage_if_unblocked: +1.5pp to +2pp if all 485 tests could run

recommendations: Fix jest config to include src/lib/ in @lib/ alias path mapping
Move src/lib/ files to lib/ to match jest config
Use direct relative imports instead of @lib/ alias
Re-run tests after import path fix to measure actual coverage
